title: The Ancient Trinkets Index [More Magic Series]
description: Discover ancients trinkets and treasure that can aid your journey!
body:
# 📦Installation
### Required
- Or-lib
- Spell Power Attributes
- Ranged Weapon API
### Strongly Recommended
- Wizards - some trinkets grant spell power bonuses
- Paladins and Priests - some trinkets grant healing power bonuses
 

# 💎 Features
### Add more than 35 Trinkets that you can find in dungeons chest all over the world!

Each trinket grant different combat related bonus.

This is NOT a vanilla friendly mod, the bonuses that this artifacts offer are VERY powerful!

For example the base trinkets can grant you bonuses that:

- Improve your strength by 15% and attack speed by 10%
- Improve your total max health by 4
- improve your ranged damage by 15%
- Improve your spell power of a certain magic school (Spell Power's Magic schols) by 15% and your spell haste by 10%
 

 

### Explore the most dangerous places!
In the most dungerous dungeons you can also find Precios sacks that when opened will give you an incredible powerfull ring or necklace!

# 🔧 Configuration
**Trinkets bonuses:**
- config/the_ancient_trinkets_index/trinkets

**Loot configs:**
- config/the_ancient_trinkets_index/loot
